CustomField.description: Instructions on how to contact the preferred lender and apply for a mortgage pre-approval. These instructions will appear in the Mortgage Pre-Approval emails. (Additional 0-255 characters).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Instructions on how to contact the preferred lender and apply for a mortgage pre-approval. These instructions will appear in the Mortgage Pre-Approval emails. (Additional 0-255 characters).
CustomField.label: Preferred Lender Contact Instructions 2
